description:
Create a new development schema named 'HR_APP' by cloning the existing 'HR' production schema using Oracle Data Pump. You must EXCLUDE the 'REGIONS' table during this process (do not export/import it). After the import, the 'EMP_DETAILS_VIEW' in the new 'HR_APP' schema will be invalid because it depends on the missing 'REGIONS' table. You must modify this view in the 'HR_APP' schema to remove the dependency (remove the join to regions and the region_name column) so that it becomes VALID and functional. 

Credentials:
- System User: system / OraclePassword123
- HR User: hr / hr123
- New HR_APP User: You determine the password (e.g., app123)
- Database: localhost:1521/XEPDB1
- Container Name: oracle-xe

Use the default DATA_PUMP_DIR directory object.
